scripts.deploy:baseSepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=baseSepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PredictionMarket.ts --network baseSepolia --verify --reset
scripts.deploy:sepolia: HARDHAT_NETWORK=sepolia npx hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/PredictionMarket.ts --network sepolia --verify --reset
scripts.size: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const artifact = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('artifacts/contracts/PredictionMarket.sol/PredictionMarket.json', 'utf8')); const bytecodeSize = (artifact.bytecode.length - 2) / 2; console.log('Deployed bytecode size:', bytecodeSize, 'bytes'); console.log('Contract is', bytecodeSize < 24576 ? 'DEPLOYABLE ✓' : 'TOO LARGE ✗');"
